LanguageData.ABY_ApparelAegis_GizmoNoStack: Suppressed while an external shield belt or shield apparel is worn.
LanguageData.ABY_ApparelAegis_InfoHeaderDesc: Built-in passive shield profile for this armor.
LanguageData.ABY_ApparelAegis_InfoCapacityDesc: Maximum shield points available before the armor aegis collapses.
LanguageData.ABY_ApparelAegis_InfoRechargeDelayDesc: Time after a shield hit before the armor aegis can begin restoring charge.
LanguageData.ABY_ApparelAegis_InfoRechargeRateDesc: Shield points restored while the armor aegis is recharging.
LanguageData.ABY_ApparelAegis_InfoBlocksDesc: Damage classes intercepted before normal armor resolution.
LanguageData.ABY_ApparelAegis_InfoOutgoingDesc: This custom armor aegis intercepts incoming damage only and does not prevent the wearer from shooting outward.
LanguageData.ABY_ApparelAegis_InfoExternalShieldDesc: When a shield belt or external shield apparel is worn, this armor aegis is disabled to prevent shield stacking.
